task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal or text editor displaying the contents of /tmp/task_patient_info.txt to identify the target patient.
LibreHealth EHR login screen with credentials (admin/password) entered, or the main dashboard visible after a successful login.

task_completion.description: Search for and access the correct patient's record
task_completion.visual_evidence: The patient dashboard or summary screen is open for the specific patient identified in the text file.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the Social History section
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'History' or 'Social History' edit form is open for the patient.

task_completion.description: Enter the specified Tobacco and Alcohol details
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Social History form shows 'Current every day smoker' for Tobacco Use and 'Beer and wine, 4-5 drinks per week' for Alcohol.

task_completion.description: Enter the specified Drugs, Counseling, and Exercise details
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Social History form shows 'None' for Recreational Drugs, 'N/A' for Counseling, and 'Sedentary lifestyle, no regular exercise' for Exercise Patterns.
Clicking a 'Save' button on the Social History form, or a confirmation screen/message showing the history was successfully updated.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the LibreHealth EHR web interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser navigating the LibreHealth EHR system, rather than terminal commands executing SQL queries to update the database directly.

integrity.description: The agent updated the specific patient assigned in the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: The patient name in the EHR matches the name retrieved from /tmp/task_patient_info.txt, rather than a random or newly created patient.

integrity.description: The agent entered the data into the actual EHR form.
integrity.visual_evidence: The text is typed into the appropriate input fields within the LibreHealth EHR Social History page, not just written into a text file or terminal.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target patient is specified in /tmp/task_patient_info.txt. The agent must update the LibreHealth EHR Social History form with the following values: Tobacco Use: 'Current every day smoker', Alcohol: 'Beer and wine, 4-5 drinks per week' (keywords: beer, wine, 4-5, drinks), Recreational Drugs: 'None' or 'N/A', Counseling: 'N/A' or 'None', Exercise Patterns: 'Sedentary lifestyle, no regular exercise' (keywords: sedentary, no regular).
